2016May 22, 2016

🇯🇵 Sapporo, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Sapporo, Japan, May 22, 2016 -- May 27, 2016

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2016-05-sapporo-japan

14 Resolutions

929Plenary
Approve new work item to create ISO 10303-210 Edition 4
SC4 approves a NP to create a new edition 4 of 10303-210 with the same scope as 10303-210 edition 3 "Electronic assembly, interconnection, and packaging design", using the enlarged timescale, with ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
928Plenary
Establish liaison with International Association of Oil and Gas Producers (IOGP)
SC4 asks its secretariat to initiate a liaison to this association as soon as possible.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
927Plenary
Create Ad Hoc Group to support ISO/IEC DPPC Task Force
SC4 creates an Ad Hoc group to shadow and support the ISO/IEC DPPC Task Force and appoints the following experts to the group: * Hiroshi Murayama, Leader and ISO 13584 and IEC 61360 expert * Wolfga...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
926Plenary
Establish 8-week ballot duration for ISO 10303-238ed2 NP
SC4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the proposed NP for ISO 10303-238ed2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
925Plenary
Approve PWI for Manufacturing Change Management
SC4 approves a PWI to create a standard for manufacturing change management as defined in SC4 N3087.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
924Plenary
Approve PWI for Modelling and Simulation Information in Collaborative Systems
SC4 approves a PWI to create standards for modeling and simulation information in a collaborative systems engineering context as defined in SC4 N3086.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
923Plenary
Move ISO 8000-62 and ISO 8000-63 to Enlarged Timeframe
SC4 requests its Secretariat to apply the enlarged timeframe to the ISO 8000-62 and ISO 8000-63 projects, with a DIS limit date of 2017-02-21.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
922Plenary
Appoint Hiroshi Murayama as SC 4 Liaison to IEC SC 3D
SC4 appoints Hiroshi Murayama for a three-year term as the SC 4 Liaison to IEC SC 3D, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its great appreciation to Ken Virgil for his excellent service and hard work as Secretary to SC 4 since 2014 and wishes him the very best in his future endeavours.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to the following individuals and organizations for their participation in the 71st ISO/TC 184/SC 4 AP242 Tutorial in Sapporo, Japan 2016-05-24: * Max Ungerer, ProSTEP...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to the following individuals and organizations for their participation in the 71st ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Industry Day in Sapporo, Japan 2016-05-25: * Steven Vettermann, Pro...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to Akihiko Ohtaka, Yoshihito Kikuchi, Hiroyuki Hiraoka, and the Manufacturing Science and Technology Center for hosting the 71st ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary in Sapporo, J...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
